replies.msg:
唔係
首先 hard/ very hard/ soft, etc. 係無明確界定 唔同國家對hard/soft分界有自己標準 唯一通用既只係數值

Stadt Zurich 聲稱Zurich 係soft water https://www.stadt-zuerich.ch/dib/de/index/wasserversorgung.html

"Die Stadt Zürich verfügt über weiches Wasser, mit einem Härtegrad von 14-19 °fH (7-10°dH)."

weiches Wasser = soft water 不過我認為只係因為Switzerland water hardness俾佢高既地方實在太多佢先定為soft water 瑞士中部同北部water hardness比南部高

如果用UK standard佢係moderate hard
https://www.unitedutilities.com/globalassets/documents/pdf/waterhardnessfactsheet_acc16.pdf

用wiki既 United States Geological Survey standard 佢係hard而唔係very hard

但係Zurich既水肯撚定硬過香港

https://www.wsd.gov.hk/filemanager/common/annual_report/2015_16/common/pdf/16_annexes.pdf

Total hardness (as mg/L CaCO3) mean: 37


1 degree fH = 10 mg/L CaCO3
